items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: It is where the Order of the Deep crafts Common Echoes.

options.text: Are we supposed to pass through here?

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Yes. The Orchestration Altar is there.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Keep your eyes sharp. The mist is another trap they've set for us.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: So let's avoid it. Which way is faster?

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: The right one seems closer and safer.
